title: Largest Solar Farm In US Coming To Central Valley In California
description:
In California's Central Valley, a plan is being put forth to turn unused farmland into the largest solar installation in the US.

The post Largest Solar Farm In US Coming To Central Valley In California appeared first on CleanTechnica.
